docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF BRIAN LANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT, INC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANG, BRIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LYFT,INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 FILED BY LANG, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT,INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-20-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BRIAN LANG IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM LY ALLOW THE REQUESTED CONTINUANCE. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $25. SERVED MAR-29-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT,INC
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2023 - JUDGMENT.
